title: athyrium oxyphyllum
intro: Athyrium oxyphyllum, also known as the Oxyphyllum or the Mountain Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Athyrium in the family Woodsiaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Athyrium oxyphyllum include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections, while also promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Athyrium oxyphyllum are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
